hooks.command: changed=$( { git diff --name-only origin/main 2>/dev/null; git status --porcelain --no-renames 2>/dev/null | cut -c4-; } | sort -u ); if printf '%s\n' "$changed" | grep -qE '^(core|skills)/' && ! printf '%s\n' "$changed" | grep -qx 'assistant/GUIDED-FLOW.md'; then printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"Fold-in check (standing rule): this branch changed core/ or skills/ but not assistant/GUIDED-FLOW.md. If a step was dogfooded/proven this session, fold its prompt into assistant/GUIDED-FLOW.md (mark it proven, in its own small PR) before wrapping."}'; fi; exit 0
